description: Lap 1 writes a corrected output.json: adds the missing confidentiality clause object and fixes governing_law from a bare string to the required {present, text} shape. JsonSchemaGate validates cleanly on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys, in a legal-industry setting.

interactions.agent_output: Read schema.json: clauses requires termination/indemnification/governing_law/confidentiality, each an object with present (boolean) and text (string), additionalProperties false throughout. Read output.json: confidentiality is missing entirely from clauses, and governing_law is a bare string 'Delaware' instead of a {present, text} object. Adding confidentiality and fixing governing_law.
interactions.notes: The fix — output.json now validates against schema.json. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
